commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: verify flr with full and failover test groups
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: verify flr with full and failover test groups

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full
Test-Parameters: fortestonly envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testgroup=full
Test-Parameters: fortestonly envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,REQFAIL=100 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testgroup=failover
Test-Parameters: fortestonly envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,ONLY=200 mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=racer,racer,racer,racer,racer,racer
